splash.tagline: Every euro you track is a step toward your freedom

hero.explanation: Your daily margin: what's left this month ÷ days remaining.

monthContext.variableSubtitle: {{month}} only. On the 1st, a new list starts.
monthContext.fixedRepeats: They repeat every month, same amounts.
monthContext.bannerNewMonthBody: Variable expenses start fresh. Your fixed costs stay the same.
monthContext.bannerEndMonthBody: {{daysLeft}} days left. Review your spending before the next month begins.

rule503020.title: 50/30/20 Rule
rule503020.subtitle: Needs, wants, and savings vs your income ({{income}})
rule503020.explanation: Expenses are classified by category: food, health & fixed = needs; leisure & clothing = wants.

onboarding.title: Let's set up your month
onboarding.subtitle: Three questions and you're done. You can change it anytime in Settings.
onboarding.incomeDescription: Your after-tax income. It doesn't need to be exact.
onboarding.fixedQuestion: What fixed expenses do you have per month?
onboarding.fixedDescription: Rent, subscriptions, insurance… What you pay every month without fail.
onboarding.fixedOptional: This step is optional. Add them now or later in Settings.
onboarding.savingsQuestion: How much do you want to save per month?
onboarding.savingsSubtitle: Choose how you'd like to define your savings.
onboarding.savingsTip: The 50/30/20 rule suggests saving 20% of your income. You can change it later.

landing.hero: Track your daily and monthly spending with a dashboard that shows how much you can spend today and what's left this month.
landing.bullet1: Log your daily expenses and see how they spread across the month.
landing.bullet2: Totals and calculations on the main screen — no loose spreadsheets.
landing.bullet3: Sign up or log in to save your data on the server and never lose it.
landing.footer: One user, one account: your data stays separate.

login.title: One account per person, no mix-ups.
login.name: Your name (shown in the header)
login.passwordMinError: Password must be at least 8 characters
login.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the
login.forgotDesc: We'll send a temporary password to your account email. If nothing arrives, check spam.

header.tagline: Your daily margin, clear and instant.

nav.yourIncomeDesc: Monthly income, savings and extra income
nav.exportDesc: Settings, fixed and variable expenses this month
nav.guidedTourDesc: Tutorial: what each area of the panel does

variableExpenses.title: Day-to-day expenses
variableExpenses.subtitle: Add your daily purchases and one-off spending here
variableExpenses.description: Each entry updates how much you have left and your daily cap. For recurring monthly expenses, use Fixed expenses.

fixedExpenses.title: Fixed expenses
fixedExpenses.subtitle: What you pay the same each month
fixedExpenses.description: Housing, insurance, subscriptions… add them here.

savingsGoals.title: Savings goals
savingsGoals.subtitle: Named goals with amounts; update how much you've saved.
savingsGoals.empty: No goals yet. Add one with a name and euro target.
savingsGoals.nameError: Enter a name for the goal

incomeSettings.title: Set up your income
incomeSettings.subtitle: Monthly income, salary savings and extra income this month.
incomeSettings.savingsPercentHint: Only on monthly income. Extra income has its own rule in the other tab.
incomeSettings.savingsFixedHint: Fixed each month, separate from monthly income.
incomeSettings.dailyNotifyDesc: Positive message when opening the app and, if the server has VAPID, also via push with the app closed (daily cron). One per day max.
incomeSettings.notifyError: Enable notifications in your browser or system settings to receive the daily reminder.
incomeSettings.extraDesc: Bonus, extra pay… Only counts if the date falls in this month. What you reserve here won't add to «You can spend today»; the rest will.
incomeSettings.extraSavingsQuestion: How much to save from this income?
incomeSettings.extraPercentHint: That percentage of the extra income won't count towards your spending margin.
incomeSettings.extraFixedHint: Cannot exceed the extra income amount.
incomeSettings.extraError: Enter an amount greater than zero for the extra income.
incomeSettings.pctError: The savings percentage must be between 0 and 100.
incomeSettings.fixedError: Enter a valid fixed savings amount.
incomeSettings.savingsExceedError: You can't save more than the extra income amount.
incomeSettings.extraSavingsAll: All reserved · doesn't add to margin

account.title: Account
account.description: Income, categories and goals are in the main menu. Here you only manage your session and, if needed, account closure.
account.dangerDesc: Deleting your account permanently removes expenses, categories and settings. We'll ask for your password in a second step.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: Final step: all your data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.errorEmpty: Enter your password to confirm deletion.

forcePassword.title: Choose a new password
forcePassword.description: You logged in with the temporary password from the email. For security, set a password only you know.
forcePassword.passwordError: New password must be at least 8 characters

categoryManager.title: Expense categories
categoryManager.name: Name
categoryManager.budgetHint: If you spend more than this amount in the month, the app will alert you.

cookieConsent.message: GastoDeHoy uses necessary technical cookies to work. With your permission, we use anonymous analytics (no third-party cookies) to improve the app.
cookieConsent.privacyLink: More info in the privacy policy.

step1.title: How much to spend today
step1.body: The big number is today's margin.

step4.title: Insights
step4.body: Tips if you overspend or cut it close.

footer.legal: Content, design and software are the property of their owners. Copying, reproduction or commercial use without authorization is prohibited.

legal.title: Legal Notice and Terms of Use
legal.section2Text: Accessing and using GastoDeHoy implies acceptance of these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
legal.section3Intro: GastoDeHoy is a personal expense management tool. You agree to:
legal.section3Item1: Not use the service for illegal activities
legal.section3Item3: Not attempt to access other users' data
legal.section4Text: The design, source code, logos and contents of GastoDeHoy are the property of their owners. Reproduction without authorization is prohibited.
legal.section5Text: GastoDeHoy is provided "as is". We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or absence of errors. We are not responsible for financial decisions made based on the app's calculations.
legal.section6Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be notified by email.
legal.section7Text: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the courts of Madrid.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section2Item1: Email and name (when creating an account)
privacy.section2Item2: Expense and income data that you voluntarily enter
privacy.section2Item3: Anonymous usage data (analytics, only if you accept cookies)
privacy.section3Item1: To provide the personal expense management service
privacy.section3Item2: To authenticate you and maintain your session
privacy.section3Item3: To improve the app through anonymous analytics (with your consent)
privacy.section4Item1Text: for the data necessary for the service to function
privacy.section5Text: Your data is kept as long as your account is active. You can delete your account and all your data at any time from Settings > Delete account.
privacy.section6Part1: We use a technical session cookie (
privacy.section6Part2: ) necessary to keep you logged in. It does not require consent. If you accept, we use anonymous analytics (no third-party cookies).
privacy.section7Part1: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, limit and object to the processing of your data. Write to us at
privacy.section8Text: Your data is stored on servers within the EU with HTTPS and encryption. We do not share your data with third parties.

toasts.tourComplete: Guide completed. You can view it again from the menu.

errors.accountAlreadyExists: An account with that email already exists
